core_principle.statement: The logo is a structured engineering system mark, not a decorative identity symbol.
core_principle.interpretation: All usage must preserve structural integrity, grid logic, and transformation meaning.

primary_usage_rules.description: Logo must always be aligned to its original 10x10 engineering grid system without distortion.
The internal structure (line → module → system → gold point) must remain visually readable.
Minimum clear space must equal the height of the primary structural unit around the logo.
Only AECS colors are allowed: Engineering layer, Architectural layer, and Gold accent.

scaling_rules.guideline: Below minimum size, use simplified variant without segmentation loss

color_usage_rules.accent_rule: Gold must only appear at transformation point, never as base structure

placement_rules.alignment: Always aligned to architectural grid system
placement_rules.positioning: Must respect visual hierarchy of layout system
placement_rules.orientation: No arbitrary rotation allowed; only 0°, 90° increments

misuse_restrictions.risk: Any violation reduces engineering perception and converts brand into decorative identity

variant_usage_rules.variant_C: EPC, execution, and industrial project presentations

background_interaction_rules.neutral_background: Preferred for all official use cases

strategic_goal.objective: Ensure consistent and disciplined use of logo across all platforms
strategic_goal.outcome: Maintain perception of AvizSazeh as an architectural engineering system brand
